(powerset-lattice UNIVERSE) → any
  Form: procedure
  Construct the powerset lattice over UNIVERSE.
  Elements are lists representing subsets. Join is set union,
  meet is set intersection, bottom is the empty set, top is
  UNIVERSE, and ordering is the subset relation. Membership
  is tested with equal?.
  Parameters:
    UNIVERSE : list
  Returns: any
  Category: algebra
  Keywords: powerset, set, subset, union, intersection, power set, set lattice, collection

(lattice-join L A B) → any
  Form: procedure
  Compute the join (least upper bound) of A and B in lattice L.
  The join is the smallest element that is greater than or equal
  to both A and B.
  Parameters:
    L : any
    A : any
    B : any
  Returns: any
  Category: algebra
  Keywords: join, supremum, lub, least upper bound, union, vee, sqcup, max, or

(lattice-meet L A B) → any
  Form: procedure
  Compute the meet (greatest lower bound) of A and B in lattice L.
  The meet is the largest element that is less than or equal to
  both A and B.
  Parameters:
    L : any
    A : any
    B : any
  Returns: any
  Category: algebra
  Keywords: meet, infimum, glb, greatest lower bound, intersection, wedge, sqcap, min, and

arguments.code:
(import (wile algebra))

(define universe '(a b c d e f g h))
(define L (powerset-lattice universe))

(define J (lambda (A B) (lattice-join L A B)))
(define M (lambda (A B) (lattice-meet L A B)))

;; Sets
(define S1 '(a d f h))
(define S2 '(a f h))
(define S3 '(a b c d e f h))
(define S4 '(a b d e f g))
(define S5 '(a b c d e f))
(define S6 '(a b e))
(define S7 '(a b d g h))
(define S8 '(a d f h))

;; Compute step by step
;; Inner joins/meets
(define step1 (J S2 S3))          ; {a,f,h} ∪ {a,b,c,d,e,f,h}
(define step2 (J S1 step1))        ; {a,d,f,h} ∪ step1
(define step3 (M S4 S5))          ; {a,b,d,e,f,g} ∩ {a,b,c,d,e,f}
(define step4 (M step2 step3))     ; step2 ∩ step3

(define step5 (J S6 S7))          ; {a,b,e} ∪ {a,b,d,g,h}
(define step6 (M step5 S8))        ; step5 ∩ {a,d,f,h}

(define result (J step4 step6))    ; step4 ∪ step6

(display "step1 (S2∪S3): ") (display step1) (newline)
(display "step2 (S1∪step1): ") (display step2) (newline)
(display "step3 (S4∩S5): ") (display step3) (newline)
(display "step4 (step2∩step3): ") (display step4) (newline)
(display "step5 (S6∪S7): ") (display step5) (newline)
(display "step6 (step5∩S8): ") (display step6) (newline)
(display "result: ") (display result) (newline)

arguments.code:
(import (wile algebra))

(define universe '("a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h"))
(define L (powerset-lattice universe))
(define (join A B) (lattice-join L A B))
(define (meet A B) (lattice-meet L A B))

;; Define all the base sets
(define S1 '("a" "e" "f" "g"))
(define S2 '("b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h"))
(define S3 '("b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h"))
(define S4 '("a" "b" "e" "f" "g" "h"))
(define S5 '("b" "h"))
(define S6 '("a" "b" "c" "e" "f" "g" "h"))
(define S7 '("a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "g" "h"))
(define S8 '("b"))

;; Step 1: inner unions of left part
;; S3 ∪ S4
(define step1 (join S3 S4))
(display "S3 ∪ S4 = ") (display step1) (newline)

;; S2 ∪ step1
(define step2 (join S2 step1))
(display "S2 ∪ (S3 ∪ S4) = ") (display step2) (newline)

;; S1 ∪ step2  => left big union
(define left (join S1 step2))
(display "Left = ") (display left) (newline)

;; Step 2: right part
;; S5 ∪ S6
(define step3 (join S5 S6))
(display "S5 ∪ S6 = ") (display step3) (newline)

;; (S5 ∪ S6) ∩ S7
(define step4 (meet step3 S7))
(display "(S5 ∪ S6) ∩ S7 = ") (display step4) (newline)

;; step4 ∩ S8
(define right (meet step4 S8))
(display "Right = ") (display right) (newline)

;; Final: left ∪ right
(define result (join left right))
(display "Result = ") (display result) (newline)

  (sort (delete-duplicates (append s1 s2)) string<?))

  (filter (lambda (x) (member x s2)) s1))

(define (set-union s1 s2)
  (let* ((combined (append s1 s2))
         (deduped (let loop ((lst combined) (seen '()))
                    (cond ((null? lst) (reverse seen))
                          ((member (car lst) seen) (loop (cdr lst) seen))
                          (else (loop (cdr lst) (cons (car lst) seen))))))  )
    (list-sort string<? deduped)))

(define (set-intersect s1 s2)
  (filter (lambda (x) (member x s2)) s1))

; Define the sets
(define A '("a" "b" "c" "d" "f" "h"))
(define B '("b" "d" "e" "f" "h"))
(define C '("c" "g" "h"))
(define D '("b" "c" "d" "e"))
(define E '("b" "c" "d" "e" "g" "h"))
(define F '("c" "f" "g"))

(define H '("c" "e" "f" "g" "h"))

; Step 1: {a,b,c,d,f,h} ∩ {b,d,e,f,h}
(define step1 (set-intersect A B))

; Step 2: step1 ∪ {c,g,h}

(define (my-sort lst)
  (if (or (null? lst) (null? (cdr lst))) lst
      (let loop ((pivot (car lst)) (rest (cdr lst)) (less '()) (greater '()))
        (if (null? rest)
            (append (my-sort less) (list pivot) (my-sort greater))
            (if (string<? (car rest) pivot)
                (loop pivot (cdr rest) (cons (car rest) less) greater)
                (loop pivot (cdr rest) less (cons (car rest) greater)))))))

(define (set-union s1 s2)
  (let* ((combined (append s1 s2))
         (deduped (let loop ((lst combined) (seen '()))
                    (cond ((null? lst) (reverse seen))
                          ((member (car lst) seen) (loop (cdr lst) seen))
                          (else (loop (cdr lst) (cons (car lst) seen)))))))
    (my-sort deduped)))

  (wile algebra lattice)            library        Lattice types: flat, powerset, product, map lattices with join/meet.

(powerset-lattice UNIVERSE) → any
  Form: procedure
  Construct the powerset lattice over UNIVERSE.
  Elements are lists representing subsets. Join is set union,
  meet is set intersection, bottom is the empty set, top is
  UNIVERSE, and ordering is the subset relation. Membership
  is tested with equal?.
  Parameters:
    UNIVERSE : list
  Returns: any
  Category: algebra
  Keywords: powerset, set, subset, union, intersection, power set, set lattice, collection

arguments.code:
(import (wile algebra))

(define universe '(a b c d e f g h))
(define L (powerset-lattice universe))

; Define sets
(define A '(a c f g))
(define B '(a b c e g h))
(define C '(f))
(define D '(d e f g h))
(define E '(e f))
(define F '(a b c e f g h))
(define G '(a b c d e f g))
(define H '(b f h))

; Compute step by step
; Inner: (B ∪ C) 
(define B-union-C (lattice-join L B C))
; (D ∩ E)
(define D-meet-E (lattice-meet L D E))
; ((B ∪ C) ∪ (D ∩ E))
(define inner (lattice-join L B-union-C D-meet-E))
; (A ∪ inner)
(define left (lattice-join L A inner))

; (F ∩ G)
(define F-meet-G (lattice-meet L F G))
; (F ∩ G) ∪ H
(define right (lattice-join L F-meet-G H))

; Final: left ∪ right
(define result (lattice-join L left right))

(display "B∪C = ") (display B-union-C) (newline)
(display "D∩E = ") (display D-meet-E) (newline)
(display "inner = ") (display inner) (newline)
(display "left = ") (display left) (newline)
(display "F∩G = ") (display F-meet-G) (newline)
(display "right = ") (display right) (newline)
(display "result = ") (display result) (newline)

(powerset-lattice UNIVERSE) → any
  Form: procedure
  Construct the powerset lattice over UNIVERSE.
  Elements are lists representing subsets. Join is set union,
  meet is set intersection, bottom is the empty set, top is
  UNIVERSE, and ordering is the subset relation. Membership
  is tested with equal?.
  Parameters:
    UNIVERSE : list
  Returns: any
  Category: algebra
  Keywords: powerset, set, subset, union, intersection, power set, set lattice, collection

(lattice-join L A B) → any
  Form: procedure
  Compute the join (least upper bound) of A and B in lattice L.
  The join is the smallest element that is greater than or equal
  to both A and B.
  Parameters:
    L : any
    A : any
    B : any
  Returns: any
  Category: algebra
  Keywords: join, supremum, lub, least upper bound, union, vee, sqcup, max, or

(lattice-meet L A B) → any
  Form: procedure
  Compute the meet (greatest lower bound) of A and B in lattice L.
  The meet is the largest element that is less than or equal to
  both A and B.
  Parameters:
    L : any
    A : any
    B : any
  Returns: any
  Category: algebra
  Keywords: meet, infimum, glb, greatest lower bound, intersection, wedge, sqcap, min, and

arguments.code:
(import (wile algebra))

;; Build the powerset lattice on {a,b,c,d,e,f,g,h}
(define universe '(a b c d e f g h))
(define L (powerset-lattice universe))

(define (J a b) (lattice-join L a b))
(define (M a b) (lattice-meet L a b))

;; Compute innermost first:
;; Step 1: {a,b,c,d,e,f,h} ∩ {a,b,c,g}
(define step1 (M '(a b c d e f h) '(a b c g)))
(display "step1: ") (display step1) (newline)

;; Step 2: step1 ∩ {c,f}
(define step2 (M step1 '(c f)))
(display "step2: ") (display step2) (newline)

;; Step 3: {a,f,g} ∪ step2
(define step3 (J '(a f g) step2))
(display "step3: ") (display step3) (newline)

;; Step 4: {b,f,h} ∩ step3
(define step4 (M '(b f h) step3))
(display "step4: ") (display step4) (newline)

;; Step 5: {g} ∪ {b,e,g}
(define step5 (J '(g) '(b e g)))
(display "step5: ") (display step5) (newline)

;; Step 6: step5 ∪ step4
(define result (J step5 step4))
(display "result: ") (display result) (newline)

step4: (f)

result: (b e g f)

; Define sets as lists and implement union and intersection
(define (my-union A B)
  (cond ((null? A) B)
        ((member (car A) B) (my-union (cdr A) B))
        (else (cons (car A) (my-union (cdr A) B)))))

(define (my-intersect A B)
  (cond ((null? A) '())
        ((member (car A) B) (cons (car A) (my-intersect (cdr A) B)))
        (else (my-intersect (cdr A) B))))

(define (sort-set S)
  (sort S (lambda (x y) (string<? (symbol->string x) (symbol->string y)))))

; Define all sets
(define S1 '(f))
(define S2 '(d e f g))
(define S3 '(a c d e f g))
(define S4 '(d e f g h))
(define S5 '(a b e g h))
(define S6 '(a b d f g h))
(define S7 '(a b e f g h))
(define S8 '(a d e f g h))

; Step 1: innermost: (S5 ∪ S6)
(define step1 (my-union S5 S6))
(display "S5 ∪ S6 = ") (display (sort-set step1)) (newline)

; Step 2: (S7 ∪ S8)
(define step2 (my-union S7 S8))
(display "S7 ∪ S8 = ") (display (sort-set step2)) (newline)

; Step 3: step1 ∪ step2
(define step3 (my-union step1 step2))
(display "(S5∪S6) ∪ (S7∪S8) = ") (display (sort-set step3)) (newline)

; Step 4: S4 ∩ step3
(define step4 (my-intersect S4 step3))
(display "S4 ∩ step3 = ") (display (sort-set step4)) (newline)

; Step 5: S3 ∪ step4
(define step5 (my-union S3 step4))
(display "S3 ∪ step4 = ") (display (sort-set step5)) (newline)

; Step 6: S1 ∩ S2
(define step6 (my-intersect S1 S2))
(display "S1 ∩ S2 = ") (display (sort-set step6)) (newline)

; Step 7: step6 ∩ step5
(define step7 (my-intersect step6 step5))
(display "Final = ") (display (sort-set step7)) (newline)

(define (set-union s1 s2)
  (define (add-unique elem lst)
    (if (member elem lst) lst (cons elem lst)))
  (fold-right add-unique s2 s1))

(define (set-intersect s1 s2)
  (filter (lambda (x) (member x s2)) s1))

(define (my-sort s)
  (define (insert x sorted)
    (cond ((null? sorted) (list x))
          ((string<? (symbol->string x) (symbol->string (car sorted)))
           (cons x sorted))
          (else (cons (car sorted) (insert x (cdr sorted))))))
  (fold-right insert '() s))

arguments.code:
(import (wile algebra))

; Define sets as sorted string lists
(define bc    '("b" "c"))
(define abefg '("a" "b" "e" "f" "g"))
(define abc   '("a" "b" "c"))
(define acdeg '("a" "c" "d" "e" "g" "h")) ; {a,c,d,e,g,h}
(define cdh   '("c" "d" "h"))
(define bcefh '("b" "c" "e" "f" "h"))
(define abcdefg '("a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g"))

; Step 1: {b,c} ∩ {a,b,e,f,g}
(define step1 (set-intersect bc abefg))
(display "Step1: ") (display step1) (newline)

; Step 2: {a,c,d,e,g,h} ∩ {c,d,h}
(define step2 (set-intersect acdeg cdh))
(display "Step2: ") (display step2) (newline)

; Step 3: step2 ∩ {b,c,e,f,h}
(define step3 (set-intersect step2 bcefh))
(display "Step3: ") (display step3) (newline)

; Step 4: step3 ∪ {a,b,c,d,e,f,g}
(define step4 (set-union step3 abcdefg))
(display "Step4: ") (display step4) (newline)

; Step 5: {a,b,c} ∩ step4
(define step5 (set-intersect abc step4))
(display "Step5: ") (display step5) (newline)

; Step 6: step1 ∩ step5  (final answer)
(define result (set-intersect step1 step5))
(display "Result: ") (display result) (newline)

; Represent sets as lists, implement union and intersection
(define (set-union a b)
  (cond ((null? a) b)
        ((member (car a) b) (set-union (cdr a) b))
        (else (cons (car a) (set-union (cdr a) b)))))

(define (set-intersect a b)
  (cond ((null? a) '())
        ((member (car a) b) (cons (car a) (set-intersect (cdr a) b)))
        (else (set-intersect (cdr a) b))))

(define (sort-set s)
  (sort s (lambda (x y) (string<? (symbol->string x) (symbol->string y)))))

(define (my-sort s)
  ; insertion sort by symbol name
  (define (insert x sorted)
    (cond ((null? sorted) (list x))
          ((string<? (symbol->string x) (symbol->string (car sorted))) (cons x sorted))
          (else (cons (car sorted) (insert x (cdr sorted))))))
  (if (null? s) '()

(powerset-lattice UNIVERSE) → any
  Form: procedure
  Construct the powerset lattice over UNIVERSE.
  Elements are lists representing subsets. Join is set union,
  meet is set intersection, bottom is the empty set, top is
  UNIVERSE, and ordering is the subset relation. Membership
  is tested with equal?.
  Parameters:
    UNIVERSE : list
  Returns: any
  Category: algebra
  Keywords: powerset, set, subset, union, intersection, power set, set lattice, collection

(set-union A B) → list
  Form: procedure
  Union of two sorted string lists.
  Parameters:
    A : list
    B : list
  Returns: list
  Category: algebra

(set-intersect A B) → list
  Form: procedure
  Intersection of two sorted string lists.
  Parameters:
    A : list
    B : list
  Returns: list
  Category: algebra

arguments.code:
(import (wile algebra))

;; Define the universe and build the powerset lattice
(define universe '("a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h"))
(define L (powerset-lattice universe))

;; Define sets as sorted string lists
(define set-b-h      '("b" "h"))
(define set-d        '("d"))
(define set-a-d-f-g-h '("a" "d" "f" "g" "h"))
(define set-f        '("f"))
(define set-e        '("e"))
(define set-a-c-e-g  '("a" "c" "e" "g"))
(define set-b-d-e-g-h '("b" "d" "e" "g" "h"))

;; Step 1: {d} ∩ {a,d,f,g,h}
(define step1 (lattice-meet L set-d set-a-d-f-g-h))
(display "Step 1: {d} ∩ {a,d,f,g,h} = ") (display step1) (newline)

;; Step 2: step1 ∪ {f}
(define step2 (lattice-join L step1 set-f))
(display "Step 2: step1 ∪ {f} = ") (display step2) (newline)

;; Step 3: {b,h} ∩ step2
(define step3 (lattice-meet L set-b-h step2))
(display "Step 3: {b,h} ∩ step2 = ") (display step3) (newline)

;; Step 4: step3 ∪ {e}
(define step4 (lattice-join L step3 set-e))
(display "Step 4: step3 ∪ {e} = ") (display step4) (newline)

;; Step 5: {a,c,e,g} ∩ {b,d,e,g,h}
(define step5 (lattice-meet L set-a-c-e-g set-b-d-e-g-h))
(display "Step 5: {a,c,e,g} ∩ {b,d,e,g,h} = ") (display step5) (newline)

;; Step 6: step4 ∪ step5
(define result (lattice-join L step4 step5))
(display "Final result: ") (display result) (newline)

; Define sets as lists and implement union/intersection
(define (set-union a b)
  (let loop ((b b) (acc a))
    (if (null? b)
        acc
        (loop (cdr b)
              (if (member (car b) acc) acc (cons (car b) acc))))))

(define (set-intersect a b)
  (filter (lambda (x) (member x b)) a))

(define (sort-set s)
  (sort s string<?))

(define (set->string s)
  (let ((sorted (sort-set (map symbol->string s))))
    (string-append "{" (string-join sorted ", ") "}")))

; Define all the base sets
(define S1 '(b e i j))
(define S2 '(c f j))
(define S3 '(b d f g h i j))
(define S4 '(d))
(define S5 '(c))
(define S6 '(a b c d f g h i j))
(define S7 '(b h i j))
(define S8 '(c e g i))
(define S9 '(b d g h i j))
(define S10 '(a d))

; Compute innermost first
; Step 1: {b,e,i,j} ∩ {c,f,j}
(define step1 (set-intersect S1 S2))
(display "Step1: ") (display (set->string step1)) (newline)

; Step 2: {d} ∪ {c}
(define step2 (set-union S4 S5))
(display "Step2: ") (display (set->string step2)) (newline)

; Step 3: {b,d,f,g,h,i,j} ∪ step2
(define step3 (set-union S3 step2))
(display "Step3: ") (display (set->string step3)) (newline)

; Step 4: step1 ∪ step3
(define step4 (set-union step1 step3))
(display "Step4: ") (display (set->string step4)) (newline)

; Step 5: {b,h,i,j} ∩ {c,e,g,i}
(define step5 (set-intersect S7 S8))
(display "Step5: ") (display (set->string step5)) (newline)

; Step 6: {a,b,c,d,f,g,h,i,j} ∪ step5
(define step6 (set-union S6 step5))
(display "Step6: ") (display (set->string step6)) (newline)

; Step 7: step4 ∩ step6
(define step7 (set-intersect step4 step6))
(display "Step7: ") (display (set->string step7)) (newline)

; Step 8: {b,d,g,h,i,j} ∩ {a,d}
(define step8 (set-intersect S9 S10))
(display "Step8: ") (display (set->string step8)) (newline)

; Step 9: step7 ∩ step8
(define step9 (set-intersect step7 step8))
(display "Final: ") (display (set->string step9)) (newline)

; Represent sets as sorted lists, implement union and intersection
(define (make-set . elems) (list->set elems))

(define (list->set lst)
  (sort lst symbol<?))

(define (set-union s1 s2)
  (list->set (append s1 s2)))

(define (set-intersect s1 s2)
  (filter (lambda (x) (member x s2)) s1))

; Define the sets from the problem
(define A '(a b c d e g j))
(define B '(d e))
(define C '(g))
(define D '(a b e f h i j))
(define E '(a b c d e f g h j))
(define F '(b e g))
(define G '(a d e f g j))
(define H '(e i))
(define I '(b c d e f g h i j))

; Compute inner parts step by step
; Left side: ({a,b,c,d,e,g,j} ∪ {d,e}) ∩ ({g} ∩ {a,b,e,f,h,i,j})
(define left-union (set-union A B))
(display "A ∪ B = ") (display left-union) (newline)

(define inner-intersect (set-intersect C D))
(display "C ∩ D = ") (display inner-intersect) (newline)

(define left-side (set-intersect left-union inner-intersect))
(display "Left side = ") (display left-side) (newline)

; Right side inner: ({b,e,g} ∪ {a,d,e,f,g,j}) ∪ {e,i}
(define r1 (set-union F G))
(display "F ∪ G = ") (display r1) (newline)

(define r2 (set-union r1 H))
(display "r1 ∪ H = ") (display r2) (newline)

; Right side: ({a,b,c,d,e,f,g,h,j} ∪ r2) ∩ {b,c,d,e,f,g,h,i,j}
(define r3 (set-union E r2))
(display "E ∪ r2 = ") (display r3) (newline)

(define right-side (set-intersect r3 I))
(display "Right side = ") (display right-side) (newline)

; Final: left-side ∪ right-side
(define result (set-union left-side right-side))
(display "Final result = ") (display result) (newline)

; Use a simple insertion sort for symbols
(define (sym-insert x lst)
  (cond ((null? lst) (list x))
        ((symbol<? x (car lst)) (cons x lst))
        ((eq? x (car lst)) lst)  ; remove duplicates
        (else (cons (car lst) (sym-insert x (cdr lst))))))

(define (list->set lst)
  (if (null? lst) '()
      (sym-insert (car lst) (list->set (cdr lst)))))

(define (set-union s1 s2)
  (list->set (append s1 s2)))

(define (set-intersect s1 s2)
  (filter (lambda (x) (member x s2)) s1))

; Define the sets
(define A (list->set '(a b c d e g j)))
(define B (list->set '(d e)))
(define C (list->set '(g)))
(define D (list->set '(a b e f h i j)))
(define E (list->set '(a b c d e f g h j)))
(define F (list->set '(b e g)))
(define G (list->set '(a d e f g j)))
(define H (list->set '(e i)))
(define I (list->set '(b c d e f g h i j)))

; Left side: (A ∪ B) ∩ (C ∩ D)
(define left-union (set-union A B))
(display "A ∪ B = ") (display left-union) (newline)

(define inner-intersect (set-intersect C D))
(display "C ∩ D = ") (display inner-intersect) (newline)

(define left-side (set-intersect left-union inner-intersect))
(display "Left side = ") (display left-side) (newline)

; Right side: (E ∪ ((F ∪ G) ∪ H)) ∩ I
(define r1 (set-union F G))
(display "F ∪ G = ") (display r1) (newline)

(define r2 (set-union r1 H))
(display "(F∪G) ∪ H = ") (display r2) (newline)

(define r3 (set-union E r2))
(display "E ∪ r2 = ") (display r3) (newline)

(define right-side (set-intersect r3 I))
(display "Right side = ") (display right-side) (newline)

; Final result
(define result (set-union left-side right-side))
(display "FINAL = ") (display result) (newline)

; Use string comparison for symbol ordering
(define (sym<? a b)
  (string<? (symbol->string a) (symbol->string b)))

(define (sym-insert x lst)
  (cond ((null? lst) (list x))
        ((sym<? x (car lst)) (cons x lst))
        ((eq? x (car lst)) lst)  ; skip duplicate
        (else (cons (car lst) (sym-insert x (cdr lst))))))

(define (list->set lst)
  (if (null? lst) '()
      (sym-insert (car lst) (list->set (cdr lst)))))

(define (set-union s1 s2)
  (list->set (append s1 s2)))

(define (set-intersect s1 s2)
  (filter (lambda (x) (member x s2)) s1))

; Define the sets
(define A (list->set '(a b c d e g j)))
(define B (list->set '(d e)))
(define C (list->set '(g)))
(define D (list->set '(a b e f h i j)))
(define E (list->set '(a b c d e f g h j)))

; Left side: (A ∪ B) ∩ (C ∩ D)
(define left-union (set-union A B))
(display "A ∪ B = ") (display left-union) (newline)

(define inner-intersect (set-intersect C D))
(display "C ∩ D = ") (display inner-intersect) (newline)

(define left-side (set-intersect left-union inner-intersect))

; Right side: (E ∪ ((F ∪ G) ∪ H)) ∩ I

(powerset-lattice UNIVERSE) → any
  Form: procedure
  Construct the powerset lattice over UNIVERSE.
  Elements are lists representing subsets. Join is set union,
  meet is set intersection, bottom is the empty set, top is
  UNIVERSE, and ordering is the subset relation. Membership
  is tested with equal?.
  Parameters:
    UNIVERSE : list
  Returns: any
  Category: algebra
  Keywords: powerset, set, subset, union, intersection, power set, set lattice, collection

(lattice-join L A B) → any
  Form: procedure
  Compute the join (least upper bound) of A and B in lattice L.
  The join is the smallest element that is greater than or equal
  to both A and B.
  Parameters:
    L : any
    A : any
    B : any
  Returns: any
  Category: algebra
  Keywords: join, supremum, lub, least upper bound, union, vee, sqcup, max, or

(lattice-meet L A B) → any
  Form: procedure
  Compute the meet (greatest lower bound) of A and B in lattice L.
  The meet is the largest element that is less than or equal to
  both A and B.
  Parameters:
    L : any
    A : any
    B : any
  Returns: any
  Category: algebra
  Keywords: meet, infimum, glb, greatest lower bound, intersection, wedge, sqcap, min, and

arguments.code:
(import (wile algebra))

; Define the universe and powerset lattice
(define universe '("a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h" "i" "j"))
(define L (powerset-lattice universe))

; Define the sets
(define S1 '("a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "g" "h" "i" "j"))
(define S2 '("a" "b" "d" "e" "f" "h" "i" "j"))
(define S3 '("b" "e"))
(define S4 '("a" "b" "c" "f" "g" "i" "j"))
(define S5 '("f" "g"))
(define S6 '("c" "e" "f" "j"))
(define S7 '("d" "f" "h" "i"))
(define S8 '("b" "d" "e" "i"))
(define S9 '("c" "f" "g" "j"))

; Step 1: Inner meets and joins
; S2 ∩ S3
(define step1 (lattice-meet L S2 S3))
(display "S2 ∩ S3 = ") (display step1) (newline)

; S1 ∩ step1
(define step2 (lattice-meet L S1 step1))
(display "S1 ∩ (S2 ∩ S3) = ") (display step2) (newline)

; S4 ∪ S5
(define step3 (lattice-join L S4 S5))
(display "S4 ∪ S5 = ") (display step3) (newline)

; S6 ∩ S7
(define step4 (lattice-meet L S6 S7))
(display "S6 ∩ S7 = ") (display step4) (newline)

; step4 ∪ S8
(define step5 (lattice-join L step4 S8))
(display "(S6 ∩ S7) ∪ S8 = ") (display step5) (newline)

; step5 ∪ S9
(define step6 (lattice-join L step5 S9))
(display "((S6 ∩ S7) ∪ S8) ∪ S9 = ") (display step6) (newline)

; step3 ∩ step6
(define step7 (lattice-meet L step3 step6))
(display "(S4 ∪ S5) ∩ (((S6 ∩ S7) ∪ S8) ∪ S9) = ") (display step7) (newline)

; Final: step2 ∩ step7
(define result (lattice-meet L step2 step7))
(display "Final result = ") (display result) (newline)

arguments.code:
(import (wile algebra))

; Define sets
(define A '("a" "d" "e" "h" "i"))
(define B '("a" "d" "e"))
(define C '("b" "c" "e" "f" "g" "h" "i" "j"))
(define D '("c" "g" "i" "j"))
(define E '("f" "g" "h" "i" "j"))
(define F '("b" "c" "e" "f" "g" "h" "j"))
(define G '("a" "b" "c" "f" "g" "h" "j"))
(define H '("c" "d" "e" "g" "j"))
(define I '("a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "g" "h" "i" "j"))

; Step 1: {a,d,e,h,i} ∩ {a,d,e}
(define step1 (set-intersect A B))
(display "step1: ") (display step1) (newline)

; Step 2: {c,g,i,j} ∪ {f,g,h,i,j}
(define step2 (set-union D E))
(display "step2: ") (display step2) (newline)

; Step 3: {b,c,e,f,g,h,j} ∩ {a,b,c,f,g,h,j}
(define step3 (set-intersect F G))
(display "step3: ") (display step3) (newline)

; Step 4: step2 ∪ step3
(define step4 (set-union step2 step3))
(display "step4: ") (display step4) (newline)

; Step 5: {b,c,e,f,g,h,i,j} ∩ step4
(define step5 (set-intersect C step4))
(display "step5: ") (display step5) (newline)

; Step 6: step1 ∩ step5
(define step6 (set-intersect step1 step5))
(display "step6: ") (display step6) (newline)

; Step 7: {c,d,e,g,j} ∩ {a,b,c,d,e,g,h,i,j}
(define step7 (set-intersect H I))
(display "step7: ") (display step7) (newline)

; Final: step6 ∪ step7
(define result (set-union step6 step7))
(display "result: ") (display result) (newline)

; Define sets as lists and implement union/intersection
(define (set-union s1 s2)
  (let loop ((s s2) (acc s1))
    (if (null? s)
        (sort acc string<?)
        (if (member (car s) acc)
            (loop (cdr s) acc)
            (loop (cdr s) (cons (car s) acc))))))

(define (set-intersection s1 s2)
  (let loop ((s s1) (acc '()))
    (if (null? s)
        (sort acc string<?)
        (if (member (car s) s2)
            (loop (cdr s) (cons (car s) acc))
            (loop (cdr s) acc)))))

; Define the sets
(define A '("b" "h"))
(define B '("a" "b" "c" "e" "h" "i" "j"))
(define C '("b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "h" "i"))
(define D '("f"))
(define E '("b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h" "i" "j"))
(define F '("a" "d" "g" "h" "i" "j"))
(define G '("a" "b" "c" "e" "g" "h" "j"))
(define H '("a" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h"))
(define I '("a" "b" "e" "g" "h"))

; Step 1: B ∪ C
(define step1 (set-union B C))
(display "B ∪ C = ") (display step1) (newline)

; Step 2: A ∩ step1 = {b,h} ∩ (B ∪ C)
(define step2 (set-intersection A step1))
(display "{b,h} ∩ (B ∪ C) = ") (display step2) (newline)

; Step 3: E ∩ F
(define step3 (set-intersection E F))
(display "E ∩ F = ") (display step3) (newline)

; Step 4: G ∩ H
(define step4 (set-intersection G H))
(display "G ∩ H = ") (display step4) (newline)

; Step 5: step3 ∩ step4
(define step5 (set-intersection step3 step4))
(display "(E∩F) ∩ (G∩H) = ") (display step5) (newline)

; Step 6: D ∪ step5
(define step6 (set-union D step5))
(display "{f} ∪ step5 = ") (display step6) (newline)

; Step 7: step6 ∪ I
(define step7 (set-union step6 I))
(display "step6 ∪ {a,b,e,g,h} = ") (display step7) (newline)

; Step 8: step2 ∪ step7
(define step8 (set-union step2 step7))
(display "Final result = ") (display step8) (newline)

arguments.code:
(import (wile algebra))

; Define sets as sorted string lists
(define A (sort-strings '("b" "h")))
(define B (sort-strings '("a" "b" "c" "e" "h" "i" "j")))
(define C (sort-strings '("b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "h" "i")))
(define D (sort-strings '("f")))
(define E (sort-strings '("b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h" "i" "j")))
(define F (sort-strings '("a" "d" "g" "h" "i" "j")))
(define G (sort-strings '("a" "b" "c" "e" "g" "h" "j")))
(define H (sort-strings '("a" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h")))
(define I (sort-strings '("a" "b" "e" "g" "h")))

; Step 1: B ∪ C
(define step1 (set-union B C))
(display "B ∪ C = ") (display step1) (newline)

; Step 2: {b,h} ∩ (B ∪ C)
(define step2 (set-intersect A step1))
(display "{b,h} ∩ (B∪C) = ") (display step2) (newline)

; Step 3: E ∩ F
(define step3 (set-intersect E F))
(display "E ∩ F = ") (display step3) (newline)

; Step 4: G ∩ H
(define step4 (set-intersect G H))
(display "G ∩ H = ") (display step4) (newline)

; Step 5: (E∩F) ∩ (G∩H)
(define step5 (set-intersect step3 step4))
(display "(E∩F) ∩ (G∩H) = ") (display step5) (newline)

; Step 6: {f} ∪ step5
(define step6 (set-union D step5))
(display "{f} ∪ step5 = ") (display step6) (newline)

; Step 7: step6 ∪ {a,b,e,g,h}
(define step7 (set-union step6 I))
(display "step6 ∪ {a,b,e,g,h} = ") (display step7) (newline)

; Step 8: step2 ∪ step7  (final result)
(define step8 (set-union step2 step7))
(display "Final result = ") (display step8) (newline)

arguments.code:
(import (wile algebra))

;; Build the powerset lattice on {a,b,c,d,e,f,g,h,i,j}
(define universe (list "a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h" "i" "j"))
(define L (powerset-lattice universe))

;; Define sets
(define s1  (list "a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "g" "i"))
(define s2  (list "a" "b" "e" "g" "i"))
(define s3  (list "b" "c" "e"))
(define s4  (list "b" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h" "i" "j"))
(define s5  (list "b" "e" "i"))
(define s6  (list "a" "d" "h"))
(define s7  (list "h"))
(define s8  (list "a" "c" "d" "e" "f" "h" "i"))
(define s9  (list "a" "c"))

;; Evaluate the expression step by step
;; Inner left: (((s1 ∪ s2) ∩ s3) ∩ s4)
(define step1 (lattice-join L s1 s2))
(define step2 (lattice-meet L step1 s3))
(define step3 (lattice-meet L step2 s4))

;; Inner right: ((s5 ∪ s6) ∪ (s7 ∪ (s8 ∪ s9)))
(define step4 (lattice-join L s5 s6))
(define step5 (lattice-join L s8 s9))
(define step6 (lattice-join L s7 step5))
(define step7 (lattice-join L step4 step6))

;; Final: step3 ∩ step7
(define result (lattice-meet L step3 step7))

(display "step1 (s1∪s2): ") (display step1) (newline)
(display "step2 (∩s3):   ") (display step2) (newline)
(display "step3 (∩s4):   ") (display step3) (newline)
(display "step4 (s5∪s6): ") (display step4) (newline)
(display "step5 (s8∪s9): ") (display step5) (newline)
(display "step6 (s7∪step5): ") (display step6) (newline)
(display "step7 (step4∪step6): ") (display step7) (newline)
(display "result (step3∩step7): ") (display result) (newline)

tool_trace.output:
{"output":"step1 (s1∪s2): (c d a b e g i)
step2 (∩s3):   (c b e)
step3 (∩s4):   (b e)
step4 (s5∪s6): (b e i a d h)
step5 (s8∪s9): (d e f h i a c)
step6 (s7∪step5): (d e f h i a c)
step7 (step4∪step6): (b d e f h i a c)
result (step3∩step7): (b e)
"}

Rewriting: axiom-driven term normalization. Symbolic: theory projections, recursive normalization, transformation tracing.

(powerset-lattice UNIVERSE) → any
  Form: procedure
  Construct the powerset lattice over UNIVERSE.
  Elements are lists representing subsets. Join is set union,
  meet is set intersection, bottom is the empty set, top is
  UNIVERSE, and ordering is the subset relation. Membership
  is tested with equal?.
  Parameters:
    UNIVERSE : list
  Returns: any
  Category: algebra
  Keywords: powerset, set, subset, union, intersection, power set, set lattice, collection

(set-union A B) → list
  Form: procedure
  Union of two sorted string lists.
  Parameters:
    A : list
    B : list
  Returns: list
  Category: algebra

(set-intersect A B) → list
  Form: procedure
  Intersection of two sorted string lists.
  Parameters:
    A : list
    B : list
  Returns: list
  Category: algebra

arguments.code:
(import (wile algebra))

; Define the universe
(define universe '("a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h" "i" "j"))
(define L (powerset-lattice universe))

; Define sets
(define A  '("a" "e" "g" "h"))
(define B  '("d" "f" "g" "h"))
(define C  '("a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h" "i"))
(define D  '("a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "i" "j"))
(define E  '("a" "b" "f" "g"))
(define F  '("a" "b" "d" "e" "f" "i" "j"))
(define G  '("b" "c" "f" "h"))
(define H  '("f"))
(define I  '("d" "f" "h"))
(define J  '("a" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h" "i" "j"))

; Compute innermost first:
; Step 1: {d,f,h} ∪ {a,c,d,e,f,g,h,i,j}
(define step1 (lattice-join L I J))
(display "Step1 (I ∪ J): ") (display step1) (newline)

; Step 2: {f} ∩ step1
(define step2 (lattice-meet L H step1))
(display "Step2 ({f} ∩ step1): ") (display step2) (newline)

; Step 3: {b,c,f,h} ∩ step2
(define step3 (lattice-meet L G step2))
(display "Step3 (G ∩ step2): ") (display step3) (newline)

; Step 4: {a,b,d,e,f,i,j} ∩ step3
(define step4 (lattice-meet L F step3))
(display "Step4 (F ∩ step3): ") (display step4) (newline)

; Step 5: {a,b,f,g} ∪ step4
(define step5 (lattice-join L E step4))
(display "Step5 (E ∪ step4): ") (display step5) (newline)

; Step 6: {a,b,c,d,e,f,g,h,i} ∩ {a,b,c,d,e,f,g,i,j}
(define step6 (lattice-meet L C D))
(display "Step6 (C ∩ D): ") (display step6) (newline)

; Step 7: step6 ∪ step5
(define step7 (lattice-join L step6 step5))
(display "Step7 (step6 ∪ step5): ") (display step7) (newline)

; Step 8: {a,e,g,h} ∩ {d,f,g,h}
(define step8 (lattice-meet L A B))
(display "Step8 (A ∩ B): ") (display step8) (newline)

; Final: step8 ∩ step7
(define result (lattice-meet L step8 step7))
(display "RESULT: ") (display result) (newline)

; Define sets as lists and implement union/intersection
(define (set-union s1 s2)
  (define (add-if-missing elem s)
    (if (member elem s) s (cons elem s)))
  (let loop ((s s2) (result s1))
    (if (null? s)
        result
        (loop (cdr s) (add-if-missing (car s) result)))))

(define (set-intersect s1 s2)
  (filter (lambda (x) (member x s2)) s1))

(define (sort-set s)
  (sort s (lambda (a b) (string<? (symbol->string a) (symbol->string b)))))

; Define the sets
(define S1 '(a c e i j))
(define S2 '(e h i))
(define S3 '(a c d e f g h i j))
(define S4 '(j))

(define S7 '(a b c d e f g i j))
(define S8 '(a g))
(define S9 '(f))
(define S10 '(a b i j))

; Step 1: {a,c,e,i,j} ∩ {e,h,i}
(define step1 (set-intersect S1 S2))
(display "Step 1: ") (display (sort-set step1)) (newline)

; Step 2: step1 ∪ {a,c,d,e,f,g,h,i,j}
(define step2 (set-union step1 S3))
(display "Step 2: ") (display (sort-set step2)) (newline)

(define step3 (set-union step2 S4))
(display "Step 3: ") (display (sort-set step3)) (newline)

(define step4 (set-intersect step3 S5))
(display "Step 4: ") (display (sort-set step4)) (newline)

; Step 5: {a,b,c,d,e,f,g,i,j} ∪ {a,g}

(powerset-lattice UNIVERSE) → any
  Form: procedure
  Construct the powerset lattice over UNIVERSE.
  Elements are lists representing subsets. Join is set union,
  meet is set intersection, bottom is the empty set, top is
  UNIVERSE, and ordering is the subset relation. Membership
  is tested with equal?.
  Parameters:
    UNIVERSE : list
  Returns: any
  Category: algebra
  Keywords: powerset, set, subset, union, intersection, power set, set lattice, collection

  Form: procedure
  Union of two sorted string lists.
  Parameters:
    A : list
    B : list
  Returns: list
  Category: algebra

  Form: procedure
  Intersection of two sorted string lists.
  Parameters:
    A : list
    B : list
  Returns: list
  Category: algebra

(import (wile algebra))

;; Define sets as sorted string lists
(define A   '("a" "b" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h" "i" "j" "l"))
(define B   '("a" "c" "f" "i" "l"))
(define C   '("a" "g" "k"))
(define D   '("b" "c" "d" "g" "h" "i" "j" "l"))
(define E   '("b" "c" "f"))
(define F   '("b" "e" "f" "g" "h" "i" "j" "k" "l"))
(define G   '("a" "b" "c" "d" "g" "i" "j" "k"))
(define H   '("b" "d" "f" "i" "j" "k" "l"))
(define I   '("a" "c" "e" "f" "h" "j"))
(define J   '("a" "b" "c" "f" "g" "h" "i" "j" "k" "l"))
(define K   '("d"))
(define L   '("a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "h" "i" "j" "l"))

;; Step 1: innermost: C ∩ D
(define step1 (set-intersect C D))
(display "C ∩ D = ") (display step1) (newline)

;; Step 2: B ∩ step1
(define step2 (set-intersect B step1))
(display "B ∩ (C ∩ D) = ") (display step2) (newline)

;; Step 3: step2 ∪ E
(define step3 (set-union step2 E))
(display "(B ∩ (C ∩ D)) ∪ E = ") (display step3) (newline)

;; Step 4: A ∩ step3
(define step4 (set-intersect A step3))
(display "A ∩ (...) = ") (display step4) (newline)

;; Step 5: G ∩ H
(define step5 (set-intersect G H))
(display "G ∩ H = ") (display step5) (newline)

;; Step 6: F ∩ step5
(define step6 (set-intersect F step5))
(display "F ∩ (G ∩ H) = ") (display step6) (newline)

;; Step 7: step4 ∪ step6
(define step7 (set-union step4 step6))
(display "left big union = ") (display step7) (newline)

;; Step 8: I ∩ J
(define step8 (set-intersect I J))
(display "I ∩ J = ") (display step8) (newline)

;; Step 9: K ∪ L
(define step9 (set-union K L))
(display "K ∪ L = ") (display step9) (newline)

;; Step 10: step8 ∩ step9
(define step10 (set-intersect step8 step9))
(display "(I ∩ J) ∩ (K ∪ L) = ") (display step10) (newline)

;; Final: step7 ∪ step10
(define result (set-union step7 step10))
(display "FINAL RESULT = ") (display result) (newline)

; Define sets as lists, implement union and intersection
(define (set-union a b)
  (cond ((null? a) b)
        ((member (car a) b) (set-union (cdr a) b))
        (else (cons (car a) (set-union (cdr a) b)))))

(define (set-intersect a b)
  (cond ((null? a) '())
        ((member (car a) b) (cons (car a) (set-intersect (cdr a) b)))
        (else (set-intersect (cdr a) b))))

(define (sort-set s)

        (else (set-intersect (cdr a) b))))

(define (list-sort lst)
  (if (null? lst) '()
    (let ((pivot (car lst))
          (rest (cdr lst)))
      (append
        (list-sort (filter (lambda (x) (string<? x pivot)) rest))
        (list pivot)
        (list-sort (filter (lambda (x) (not (string<? x pivot))) rest))))))

; Helper: represent sets as lists, implement union and intersection
(define (my-union s1 s2)
  (let loop ((s s1) (acc s2))
    (if (null? s) acc
        (loop (cdr s)
              (if (member (car s) acc) acc (cons (car s) acc))))))

(define (my-intersect s1 s2)
  (filter (lambda (x) (member x s2)) s1))

; These sets need to be sorted string lists
(define (S . elems) (sort-strings elems))

(define B (S "b" "c" "e" "f" "g" "h" "i" "j" "k" "l"))
(define C (S "a" "b" "d" "h" "k"))
(define D (S "a" "b" "c" "e" "f" "g" "h" "i" "j" "l"))
(define E (S "b" "e" "k" "l"))
(define F (S "a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "i" "j" "k"))
(define G (S "d" "f" "k"))
(define H (S "a" "c" "d" "f" "g" "h" "i" "k"))
(define I (S "a" "b" "c" "e" "f" "i" "j" "k" "l"))
(define J (S "c" "e"))

; Step 1: B ∩ C  => {b, h, k}
(define step1 (set-intersect B C))
(display "B ∩ C = ") (display step1) (newline)

; Step 2: D ∪ E  => {a,b,c,e,f,g,h,i,j,k,l}
(define step2 (set-union D E))
(display "D ∪ E = ") (display step2) (newline)

; Step 3: step1 ∩ step2 => {b, h, k}
(define step3 (set-intersect step1 step2))
(display "step1 ∩ step2 = ") (display step3) (newline)

; Step 4: B ∪ step3 => B (since step3 ⊆ B)
(define step4 (set-union B step3))
(display "B ∪ step3 = ") (display step4) (newline)

; Step 5: F ∩ G => {d, f, k}
(define step5 (set-intersect F G))
(display "F ∩ G = ") (display step5) (newline)

; Step 6: step4 ∪ step5
(define step6 (set-union step4 step5))
(display "step4 ∪ step5 = ") (display step6) (newline)

; Step 7: A ∪ step6
(define step7 (set-union A step6))
(display "A ∪ step6 = ") (display step7) (newline)

; Step 8: H ∪ I
(define step8 (set-union H I))
(display "H ∪ I = ") (display step8) (newline)

; Step 9: step8 ∩ J
(define step9 (set-intersect step8 J))
(display "step8 ∩ J = ") (display step9) (newline)

; Final: step7 ∩ step9
(define result (set-intersect step7 step9))
(display "RESULT = ") (display result) (newline)

arguments.code:
(import (wile algebra))

;; Define sets
(define A '(a b d e g l))
(define B '(d e f h))
(define C '(a f))
(define D '(a b c d h i j l))
(define E '(a b c d e f i j k))
(define F '(e))
(define G '(k))
(define H '(i k))
(define I '(a d e f j))
(define J '(b e f h i))
(define K '(a b c e l))

;; Step by step
(define step1 (set-union A B))                   ; {a,b,d,e,g,l} ∪ {d,e,f,h}
(define step2 (set-union D E))                   ; {a,b,c,d,h,i,j,l} ∪ {a,b,c,d,e,f,i,j,k}
(define step3 (set-intersect C step2))            ; {a,f} ∩ step2
(define step4 (set-intersect step1 step3))        ; step1 ∩ step3
(define step5 (set-intersect F G))               ; {e} ∩ {k}
(define step6 (set-union step4 step5))            ; step4 ∪ step5
(define step7 (set-intersect H I))               ; {i,k} ∩ {a,d,e,f,j}
(define step8 (set-union J K))                   ; {b,e,f,h,i} ∪ {a,b,c,e,l}
(define step9 (set-union step7 step8))            ; step7 ∪ step8
(define result (set-intersect step6 step9))       ; step6 ∩ step9

(display "step1: ") (display step1) (newline)
(display "step2: ") (display step2) (newline)
(display "step3: ") (display step3) (newline)
(display "step4: ") (display step4) (newline)
(display "step5: ") (display step5) (newline)
(display "step6: ") (display step6) (newline)
(display "step7: ") (display step7) (newline)
(display "step8: ") (display step8) (newline)
(display "step9: ") (display step9) (newline)
(display "result: ") (display result) (newline)

arguments.code:
(import (wile algebra))

; Define sets as sorted string lists
(define A '("a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "i" "j" "l"))
(define B '("a" "b" "d" "f" "g" "h" "k" "l"))
(define C '("j" "k" "l"))
(define D '("a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "h" "i" "j" "k" "l"))

(define E '("e" "f" "j"))
(define F '("a" "c" "d" "f" "h" "j" "k"))
(define G '("b" "h"))
(define H '("c" "e" "f" "h" "i" "l"))

(define I '("b" "d" "e" "g" "h" "i" "j" "k" "l"))
(define J '("a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "g" "h" "i" "j" "l"))
(define K '("a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "i" "j" "l"))
(define L '("b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h" "i" "j" "k"))

(define BJ '("b" "j"))

; Left branch: (((A ∪ B) ∩ C) ∩ D)
(define left
  (set-intersect
    (set-intersect
      (set-union A B)
      C)
    D))

; Right branch inner pieces
; (E ∪ F) ∩ G ∩ H
(define r1
  (set-intersect
    (set-intersect
      (set-union E F)
      G)
    H))

; ((I ∪ J) ∪ K) ∪ L
(define r2
  (set-union
    (set-union
      (set-union I J)
      K)
    L))

; (r1 ∪ r2) ∪ BJ
(define right
  (set-union
    (set-union r1 r2)
    BJ))

; Final: left ∪ right
(define result (set-union left right))

(display "left = ") (display left) (newline)
(display "r1 = ") (display r1) (newline)
(display "r2 = ") (display r2) (newline)
(display "right = ") (display right) (newline)
(display "result = ") (display result) (newline)

;; Define sets

(define s2 '("a" "b" "d" "e" "f" "g" "i" "j" "k" "l"))
(define s3 '("a" "f" "i" "j" "k" "l"))
(define s4 '("f" "g" "j" "l"))
(define s5 '("b" "d" "f" "g" "i" "k" "l"))
(define s6 '("a" "c" "e" "g" "i" "k"))
(define s7 '("a" "k"))
(define s8 '("c" "k"))
(define s9 '("b" "c" "f" "g" "h" "i" "k" "l"))
(define s10 '("a" "d" "e" "f" "h" "j" "l"))
(define s11 '("a" "f" "g" "i" "j"))
(define sj '("j"))

;; Left branch: {c,d} ∩ (...)
;; Inner left: ({b,c,d,e,f,g,h,j,l} ∪ {a,b,d,e,f,g,i,j,k,l}) ∪ ({a,f,i,j,k,l} ∩ ({f,g,j,l} ∩ {b,d,f,g,i,k,l}))

(define inner-union-1 (set-union s1 s2))
(display "s1 ∪ s2 = ") (display inner-union-1) (newline)

(define inner-inter-1 (set-intersect s4 s5))
(display "s4 ∩ s5 = ") (display inner-inter-1) (newline)

(define inner-inter-2 (set-intersect s3 inner-inter-1))
(display "s3 ∩ (s4∩s5) = ") (display inner-inter-2) (newline)

(define left-inner (set-union inner-union-1 inner-inter-2))
(display "left-inner = ") (display left-inner) (newline)

(define left-branch (set-intersect cd left-inner))
(display "left-branch = ") (display left-branch) (newline)

; Define sets and set operations
(define (make-set lst) (list->vector (sort lst symbol<?)))
(define (set-union a b)
  (let ((al (vector->list a)) (bl (vector->list b)))
    (make-set (delete-duplicates (append al bl)))))
(define (set-inter a b)
  (let ((al (vector->list a)) (bl (vector->list b)))
    (make-set (filter (lambda (x) (member x bl)) al))))

; Define all the sets
(define S1  (make-set '(e i l)))
(define S2  (make-set '(a b d f h i k l)))
(define S3  (make-set '(a e h i j l)))
(define S4  (make-set '(l)))
(define S5  (make-set '(k)))
(define S6  (make-set '(a c e f g h j l)))
(define S7  (make-set '(b e i)))
(define S8  (make-set '(c e i j k)))
(define S9  (make-set '(b c d f g h i j k l)))
(define S10 (make-set '(a f i)))
(define S11 (make-set '(b c d e f g h j k l)))
(define S12 (make-set '(a b e i k l)))

; Now compute step by step
; Innermost: {k} ∩ {a,c,e,f,g,h,j,l}
(define t1 (set-inter S5 S6))
; {l} ∩ t1
(define t2 (set-inter S4 t1))
; {b,e,i} ∩ {c,e,i,j,k}
(define t3 (set-inter S7 S8))
; {b,c,d,f,g,h,i,j,k,l} ∪ {a,f,i}
(define t4 (set-union S9 S10))
; t3 ∪ t4
(define t5 (set-union t3 t4))
; t2 ∩ t5
(define t6 (set-inter t2 t5))
; {b,c,d,e,f,g,h,j,k,l} ∪ {a,b,e,i,k,l}
(define t7 (set-union S11 S12))
; t6 ∩ t7
(define t8 (set-inter t6 t7))
; {a,e,h,i,j,l} ∩ t8
(define t9 (set-inter S3 t8))
; {e,i,l} ∩ {a,b,d,f,h,i,k,l}
(define t10 (set-inter S1 S2))
; t10 ∩ t9
(define result (set-inter t10 t9))
(display result)

(define S9  '("b" "c" "d" "f" "g" "h" "i" "j" "k" "l"))
(define S10 '("a" "f" "i"))
(define S11 '("b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h" "j" "k" "l"))
(define S12 '("a" "b" "e" "i" "k" "l"))

; Step by step
(define t1 (set-intersect S5 S6))           ; {k} ∩ {a,c,e,f,g,h,j,l}

(define t3 (set-intersect S7 S8))           ; {b,e,i} ∩ {c,e,i,j,k}

(define t9 (set-intersect S3 t8))          ; {a,e,h,i,j,l} ∩ t8

(define result (set-intersect t10 t9))     ; t10 ∩ t9

(powerset-lattice UNIVERSE) → any
  Form: procedure
  Construct the powerset lattice over UNIVERSE.
  Elements are lists representing subsets. Join is set union,
  meet is set intersection, bottom is the empty set, top is
  UNIVERSE, and ordering is the subset relation. Membership
  is tested with equal?.
  Parameters:
    UNIVERSE : list
  Returns: any
  Category: algebra
  Keywords: powerset, set, subset, union, intersection, power set, set lattice, collection

(set-union A B) → list
  Form: procedure
  Union of two sorted string lists.
  Parameters:
    A : list
    B : list
  Returns: list
  Category: algebra

(set-intersect A B) → list
  Form: procedure
  Intersection of two sorted string lists.
  Parameters:
    A : list
    B : list
  Returns: list
  Category: algebra

arguments.code:
(import (wile algebra))

;; Define sets as sorted string lists
(define A '("a" "c" "e" "g" "i"))
(define B '("a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h" "i" "k" "l" "m" "n"))
(define C '("b" "e" "j" "k" "m"))
(define D '("d" "f" "h" "j" "k" "l" "m"))
(define E '("a" "g"))
(define F '("b" "i"))
(define G '("d" "e" "l" "m"))
(define H '("a"))

;; Inner expression: Left side of outer meet
;; (((A ∩ B) ∪ (C ∩ D)) ∩ ((E ∪ F) ∪ (G ∩ H)))

(define step1 (set-intersect A B))
(display "A ∩ B = ") (display step1) (newline)

(define step2 (set-intersect C D))
(display "C ∩ D = ") (display step2) (newline)

(define step3 (set-union step1 step2))
(display "(A∩B) ∪ (C∩D) = ") (display step3) (newline)

(define step4 (set-union E F))
(display "E ∪ F = ") (display step4) (newline)

(define step5 (set-intersect G H))
(display "G ∩ H = ") (display step5) (newline)

(define step6 (set-union step4 step5))
(display "(E∪F) ∪ (G∩H) = ") (display step6) (newline)

(define left (set-intersect step3 step6))
(display "Left = ") (display left) (newline)

tool_trace.output:
{"output":"A ∩ B = (a c e g i)
C ∩ D = (j k m)
(A∩B) ∪ (C∩D) = (a c e g i j k m)
E ∪ F = (a b g i)
G ∩ H = ()
(E∪F) ∪ (G∩H) = (a b g i)
Left = (a g i)
"}

arguments.code:
;; Right side of outer meet:
;; {b,d,e,g,h,i,j,k,l,n} ∪ (( {a,b,c,d,e,g,h,i,k,l,m,n} ∪ (({a,b,c,e,f,h,l}∪{b,c,d,e,g,h,j,k}) ∪ ({a,b,c,e,h,i,j,k,m,n} ∩ {a,b,c,d,e,g,h,i,j,k,l,m,n}))) ∩ {b,e,g,h,j,k,l,m,n})

(define R1 '("b" "d" "e" "g" "h" "i" "j" "k" "l" "n"))
(define R2 '("a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "g" "h" "i" "k" "l" "m" "n"))
(define R3 '("a" "b" "c" "e" "f" "h" "l"))
(define R4 '("b" "c" "d" "e" "g" "h" "j" "k"))
(define R5 '("a" "b" "c" "e" "h" "i" "j" "k" "m" "n"))
(define R6 '("a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "g" "h" "i" "j" "k" "l" "m" "n"))
(define R7 '("b" "e" "g" "h" "j" "k" "l" "m" "n"))

;; Inner pieces
(define rA (set-union R3 R4))
(display "R3 ∪ R4 = ") (display rA) (newline)

(define rB (set-intersect R5 R6))
(display "R5 ∩ R6 = ") (display rB) (newline)

(define rC (set-union rA rB))
(display "(R3∪R4) ∪ (R5∩R6) = ") (display rC) (newline)

(define rD (set-union R2 rC))
(display "R2 ∪ rC = ") (display rD) (newline)

(define rE (set-intersect rD R7))
(display "rD ∩ R7 = ") (display rE) (newline)

(define right (set-union R1 rE))
(display "Right = ") (display right) (newline)

tool_trace.output:
{"output":"R3 ∪ R4 = (a b c d e f g h j k l)
R5 ∩ R6 = (a b c e h i j k m n)
(R3∪R4) ∪ (R5∩R6) = (a b c d e f g h i j k l m n)
R2 ∪ rC = (a b c d e f g h i j k l m n)
rD ∩ R7 = (b e g h j k l m n)
Right = (b d e g h i j k l m n)
"}

arguments.code:
;; Final answer: left ∩ right
(define answer (set-intersect left right))
(display "Final answer: ") (display answer) (newline)

tool_trace.output: {"output":"Final answer: (g i)\n"}

arguments.code:
(import (wile algebra))

;; Define sets as sorted string lists
(define A '("a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "g" "h" "i" "j" "k" "l" "m" "n"))
(define B '("a" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h" "i" "j" "k" "n"))
(define C '("b"))
(define D '("a" "b" "c" "d" "f" "h" "i" "j" "k" "l" "m" "n"))

;; Left side: (((A ∪ B) ∪ C) ∪ D)
(define left
  (set-union (set-union (set-union A B) C) D))

left

;; Right side inner sets
(define R1 '("d" "g" "l" "m"))
(define R2 '("b" "h" "j" "m"))
(define R3 '("d" "h" "j"))
(define R4 '("c" "f" "g"))

;; (R1 ∪ R2) ∪ (R3 ∪ R4)
(define right-join
  (set-union (set-union R1 R2) (set-union R3 R4)))

right-join

;; Now compute the inner meet part:
;; (({a,c,e,j,l,m} ∩ ({c,d,e,f,g,h,l,m} ∪ {b,c,d,e,f,g,h,i,j,k,l,m,n}))
;;  ∪ (({a,c,d,e,f,g,i,j,k,l,m,n} ∪ {a,d,g,i,j,l,m,n}) ∩ {a,b,d,e,f,g,h,i,j,k,l,m,n}))
;; ∩ {a,b,d,h,k}

(define M1 '("a" "c" "e" "j" "l" "m"))
(define M2a '("c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h" "l" "m"))
(define M2b '("b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h" "i" "j" "k" "l" "m" "n"))
(define M3a '("a" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "i" "j" "k" "l" "m" "n"))
(define M3b '("a" "d" "g" "i" "j" "l" "m" "n"))
(define M4 '("a" "b" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h" "i" "j" "k" "l" "m" "n"))
(define M5 '("a" "b" "d" "h" "k"))

;; M1 ∩ (M2a ∪ M2b)
(define part1 (set-intersect M1 (set-union M2a M2b)))
part1

;; (M3a ∪ M3b) ∩ M4
(define part2 (set-intersect (set-union M3a M3b) M4))
part2

;; (part1 ∪ part2) ∩ M5
(define inner-meet (set-intersect (set-union part1 part2) M5))
inner-meet

arguments.code:
(import (wile algebra))

; Define the sets
(define A '("a" "c" "f" "h" "k" "l" "m" "n"))
(define B '("a" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h" "i" "j" "l" "m" "n"))

; Inner sets for the right side
(define C '("a" "d" "i" "j" "k" "m"))
(define D '("d" "e" "m" "n"))
(define E '("b" "d" "g" "h" "i" "j" "k" "l" "n"))
(define F '("a" "f" "g" "i" "j" "n"))
(define G '("f" "g" "l"))

(define H '("b" "d" "h" "i" "n"))
(define I '("a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h" "i" "k" "m" "n"))
(define J '("e" "f" "h" "i"))

(define K '("g"))
(define L '("h" "i" "l"))
(define M '("a" "c" "d" "e" "g" "h" "i" "k" "m" "n"))
(define N '("d" "h" "i" "l" "n"))

; Step 1: A ∪ B (outer join)
(define step1 (set-union A B))
(display "A ∪ B = ") (display step1) (newline)

; Step 2: C ∩ D
(define step2 (set-intersect C D))
(display "C ∩ D = ") (display step2) (newline)

; Step 3: E ∪ F
(define step3 (set-union E F))
(display "E ∪ F = ") (display step3) (newline)

; Step 4: (C ∩ D) ∪ (E ∪ F)
(define step4 (set-union step2 step3))
(display "(C∩D) ∪ (E∪F) = ") (display step4) (newline)

; Step 5: step4 ∪ G
(define step5 (set-union step4 G))
(display "step4 ∪ G = ") (display step5) (newline)

; Step 6: H ∩ I
(define step6 (set-intersect H I))
(display "H ∩ I = ") (display step6) (newline)

; Step 7: (H ∩ I) ∪ J
(define step7 (set-union step6 J))
(display "(H∩I) ∪ J = ") (display step7) (newline)

; Step 8: L ∩ M
(define step8 (set-intersect L M))
(display "L ∩ M = ") (display step8) (newline)

; Step 9: K ∩ (L ∩ M)  i.e. {g} ∩ step8
(define step9 (set-intersect K step8))
(display "K ∩ (L∩M) = ") (display step9) (newline)

; Step 10: step9 ∪ N
(define step10 (set-union step9 N))
(display "step9 ∪ N = ") (display step10) (newline)

; Step 11: step7 ∩ step10
(define step11 (set-intersect step7 step10))
(display "step7 ∩ step10 = ") (display step11) (newline)

; Step 12: step5 ∪ step11
(define step12 (set-union step5 step11))
(display "step5 ∪ step11 = ") (display step12) (newline)

; Step 13: Final: step1 ∩ step12
(define result (set-intersect step1 step12))
(display "FINAL = ") (display result) (newline)

(import (wile algebra))

; Define sets as sorted string lists
(define A1 '("a" "b" "c" "d" "g" "h" "j" "k" "l" "n" "o"))
(define A2 '("b" "e" "f" "g" "h" "j" "k" "l" "n" "o"))
(define A3 '("a" "b" "c" "e" "f" "h" "i" "j" "l" "m" "n" "p"))
(define B1 '("a" "f" "g" "k" "l"))
(define B2 '("b" "i" "j" "k" "o"))

; Inner part of first big section: A2 ∩ A3
(define inner1 (set-intersect A2 A3))
; Then A1 ∩ inner1
(define inner2 (set-intersect A1 inner1))
; Then inner2 ∩ (B1 ∪ B2)
(define left-top (set-intersect inner2 (set-union B1 B2)))

(display "A2 ∩ A3 = ") (display inner1) (newline)
(display "A1 ∩ (A2∩A3) = ") (display inner2) (newline)
(display "B1 ∪ B2 = ") (display (set-union B1 B2)) (newline)
(display "Left top = ") (display left-top) (newline)

arguments.code:
; Define sets as lists and implement union/intersection
(define (my-union a b)
  (cond ((null? a) b)
        ((member (car a) b) (my-union (cdr a) b))
        (else (cons (car a) (my-union (cdr a) b)))))

(define (my-intersect a b)
  (cond ((null? a) '())
        ((member (car a) b) (cons (car a) (my-intersect (cdr a) b)))
        (else (my-intersect (cdr a) b))))

(define (sort-set s)
  (sort s (lambda (a b) (string<? (symbol->string a) (symbol->string b)))))

; Define all the base sets
(define S1 '(b d f g i l p))
(define S2 '(a c d e f h i o))
(define S3 '(e h j k l o p))
(define S4 '(b d h n p))
(define S5 '(a b c e f g h k l m p))
(define S6 '(g l m))
(define S7 '(d l))
(define S8 '(b d g j n p))
(define S9 '(g h i j k p))
(define S10 '(b e h m o))
(define S11 '(c d h k p))
(define S12 '(d))
(define S13 '(a c e f g j k o))
(define S14 '(c d e h i j k l m n p))
(define S15 '(d f g h k n o))
(define S16 '(j l o))
(define S17 '(b h j m p))
(define S18 '(a c e h i j k m n o p))
(define S19 '(f g h i j k n))

; Now compute step by step
; Inner left side:
; {b,d,f,g,i,l,p} ∩ {a,c,d,e,f,h,i,o}
(define A (my-intersect S1 S2))
(display "A = ") (display (sort-set A)) (newline)

; {b,d,h,n,p} ∪ {a,b,c,e,f,g,h,k,l,m,p}
(define B (my-union S4 S5))
(display "B = ") (display (sort-set B)) (newline)

; {e,h,j,k,l,o,p} ∩ B
(define C (my-intersect S3 B))
(display "C = ") (display (sort-set C)) (newline)

; {d,l} ∪ {b,d,g,j,n,p}
(define D (my-union S7 S8))
(display "D = ") (display (sort-set D)) (newline)

; {g,l,m} ∪ D
(define E (my-union S6 D))
(display "E = ") (display (sort-set E)) (newline)

; C ∪ E
(define F (my-union C E))
(display "F = ") (display (sort-set F)) (newline)

; A ∪ F
(define G (my-union A F))
(display "G = ") (display (sort-set G)) (newline)

(import (wile algebra))

; Sets as sorted string lists
(define S1  '("b" "d" "f" "g" "i" "l" "p"))
(define S2  '("a" "c" "d" "e" "f" "h" "i" "o"))
(define S3  '("e" "h" "j" "k" "l" "o" "p"))
(define S4  '("b" "d" "h" "n" "p"))
(define S5  '("a" "b" "c" "e" "f" "g" "h" "k" "l" "m" "p"))
(define S6  '("g" "l" "m"))
(define S7  '("d" "l"))
(define S8  '("b" "d" "g" "j" "n" "p"))
(define S9  '("g" "h" "i" "j" "k" "p"))
(define S10 '("b" "e" "h" "m" "o"))
(define S11 '("c" "d" "h" "k" "p"))
(define S12 '("d"))
(define S13 '("a" "c" "e" "f" "g" "j" "k" "o"))
(define S14 '("c" "d" "e" "h" "i" "j" "k" "l" "m" "n" "p"))
(define S15 '("d" "f" "g" "h" "k" "n" "o"))
(define S16 '("j" "l" "o"))
(define S17 '("b" "h" "j" "m" "p"))
(define S18 '("a" "c" "e" "h" "i" "j" "k" "m" "n" "o" "p"))
(define S19 '("f" "g" "h" "i" "j" "k" "n"))

; LEFT SIDE computation:
; Step 1: S1 ∩ S2
(define A (set-intersect S1 S2))
(display "A = S1∩S2 = ") (display A) (newline)

; Step 2: S4 ∪ S5
(define B (set-union S4 S5))
(display "B = S4∪S5 = ") (display B) (newline)

; Step 3: S3 ∩ B
(define C (set-intersect S3 B))
(display "C = S3∩B = ") (display C) (newline)

; Step 4: S7 ∪ S8

(import (wile algebra))

; Define sets
(define s-f-l-m '("f" "l" "m"))
(define s-abcdfgiklmop '("a" "b" "c" "d" "f" "g" "i" "k" "l" "m" "o" "p"))

; Top-level join: {f,l,m} ∪ {a,b,c,d,f,g,i,k,l,m,o,p}
(define top-join (set-union s-f-l-m s-abcdfgiklmop))
top-join

; Now compute the big right-hand side meet operand
; Start from innermost expressions

; Inner: {a,b,c,d,e,f,g,h,i,j,l,m,n,o,p} ∩ ({b,f,g,j,m,o} ∩ {b,c,d,e,f,h,i,j,k,l,m,o,p})
(define A '("a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h" "i" "j" "l" "m" "n" "o" "p"))
(define B '("b" "f" "g" "j" "m" "o"))
(define C '("b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "h" "i" "j" "k" "l" "m" "o" "p"))

(define BC (set-intersect B C))
(display "B∩C: ") (display BC) (newline)

(define ABC (set-intersect A BC))
(display "A∩(B∩C): ") (display ABC) (newline)

; Then ∪ {b,d,g,h,i,k,m}
(define D '("b" "d" "g" "h" "i" "k" "m"))
(define part1 (set-union ABC D))
(display "part1: ") (display part1) (newline)

(import (wile algebra))

; Define sets as sorted string lists
(define A '("a" "c" "d" "g" "h" "i" "j" "l" "m" "n" "o"))
(define B '("a" "b" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h" "j" "l" "m" "n"))
(define C '("a" "c" "e" "f" "g" "h" "i" "j" "k" "l" "m" "n" "o" "p"))
(define D '("c" "j" "o"))
(define E '("c" "e" "g" "k" "p"))
(define F '("b" "f" "j"))

; Inner: (C ∪ D) ∩ E
(define CuD (set-union C D))
(define CuDiE (set-intersect CuD E))
(display "CuD = ") (display CuD) (newline)
(display "(C∪D)∩E = ") (display CuDiE) (newline)

; B ∪ ((C∪D)∩E)
(define BuCuDiE (set-union B CuDiE))
(display "B∪((C∪D)∩E) = ") (display BuCuDiE) (newline)

; A ∩ (B ∪ ((C∪D)∩E))
(define AiBuCuDiE (set-intersect A BuCuDiE))
(display "A∩(...) = ") (display AiBuCuDiE) (newline)

; ∪ F
(define step1 (set-union AiBuCuDiE F))
(display "step1 = ") (display step1) (newline)

A∩(...) = (a c d g h j l m n)
step1 = (a b c d f g h j l m n)
"}

(define G '("a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "i" "l" "n" "o" "p"))
(define H '("b" "f" "g" "h" "i"))

(define HiI (set-intersect H I))

(display "H∩I = ") (display HiI) (newline)
(display "J∩K = ") (display JiK) (newline)

(display "(H∩I)∪(J∩K) = ") (display HiIuJiK) (newline)

(define L1 '("b" "c" "d" "e" "g" "h" "i" "k" "l" "n" "o" "p"))
(define L2 '("d" "e" "f" "h" "k" "l" "n" "o" "p"))

(define L7 '("a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h" "j" "k" "l" "m" "n" "o" "p"))
(define L8 '("j" "l" "n" "o" "p"))
(define L9 '("a" "d" "k" "n"))

; ((L1 ∪ L2) ∪ L3)
(define L1uL2 (set-union L1 L2))
(define L1uL2uL3 (set-union L1uL2 L3))
(display "L1∪L2∪L3 = ") (display L1uL2uL3) (newline)

; (L4 ∪ L5)
(define L4uL5 (set-union L4 L5))
(display "L4∪L5 = ") (display L4uL5) (newline)

; top ∩ (L4∪L5)
(define top_intersect (set-intersect L1uL2uL3 L4uL5))
(display "top part = ") (display top_intersect) (newline)

; (L6 ∪ L7) ∩ (L8 ∩ L9)
(define L6uL7 (set-union L6 L7))
(define L8iL9 (set-intersect L8 L9))
(display "L6∪L7 = ") (display L6uL7) (newline)
(display "L8∩L9 = ") (display L8iL9) (newline)
(define bottom_part (set-intersect L6uL7 L8iL9))
(display "bottom part = ") (display bottom_part) (newline)

; top_intersect ∩ bottom_part
(define big_nested (set-intersect top_intersect bottom_part))
(display "big_nested = ") (display big_nested) (newline)

; Now the final ∩ with ({a,b,c,d,e,f,h,i,j,l,m,n,o,p} ∩ ({a,i,k,l} ∪ {a,f,g,h,i,k,l,m,o,p}))
(define M1 '("a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "h" "i" "j" "l" "m" "n" "o" "p"))

; Final answer
(define result (set-intersect step2 M1iM2uM3))
(display "FINAL = ") (display result) (newline)

(import (wile algebra))

; Define sets as sorted string lists
(define sa '("a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h" "i" "j" "l" "m" "n" "o" "p"))
(define sb '("a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "i" "k" "m" "n" "o" "p"))
(define sc '("a" "b" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h" "i" "j" "k" "l" "m" "o" "p"))
(define sd '("a" "b" "f" "g" "h" "j" "l" "m" "n" "o" "p"))

; Inner sets
(define se '("b" "i"))
(define sf '("d" "n"))
(define sg '("a" "b" "c" "d" "f" "g" "h" "j" "k" "l" "m" "n" "o" "p"))
(define sh '("a" "d"))
(define si '("c" "d" "e" "f" "i" "j" "m" "n" "o" "p"))

(define sj '("e"))
(define sk '("f" "i" "k" "m" "n"))

(define sl '("a" "c" "d" "e" "f" "i" "j" "k" "m" "o"))
(define sm '("b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h" "i" "j" "k" "l" "m" "n" "p"))
(define sn '("a" "b" "f" "h" "m" "n"))
(define so '("a" "d" "k" "l"))
(define sp '("d" "j" "n" "o"))
(define sq '("a" "c" "d" "g" "k" "l" "m" "o"))

(define sr '("a" "l"))
(define ss '("a" "c" "d" "e" "f" "h" "j" "k" "p"))

(define st '("e" "h" "o"))
(define su '("a" "c" "d" "f" "g" "h" "i" "k" "l" "m" "n" "p"))
(define sv '("d" "e" "f" "h" "n" "o" "p"))
(define sw '("b" "c" "d" "i" "k" "l" "m" "n" "o"))
(define sx '("a" "d" "f" "g" "j" "l" "m" "n" "o"))

; Now compute step by step
; Top part: (sa ∩ sb) ∩ (sc ∪ sd)
(define top-left (set-intersect sa sb))
(define top-right (set-union sc sd))
(define top (set-intersect top-left top-right))
(display "top: ") (display top) (newline)

tool_trace.output: {"output":"top: (a b d e f i m n o p)\n"}

arguments.code:
; Now the big bottom part
; ({d,n} ∩ {a,b,c,d,f,g,h,j,k,l,m,n,o,p}) ∪ ({a,d} ∩ {c,d,e,f,i,j,m,n,o,p})
(define inner1 (set-union (set-intersect sf sg) (set-intersect sh si)))
(display "inner1: ") (display inner1) (newline)

; {b,i} ∩ inner1
(define part1 (set-intersect se inner1))
(display "part1: ") (display part1) (newline)

tool_trace.output: {"output":"inner1: (d n)\npart1: ()\n"}

arguments.code:
; {e} ∪ {f,i,k,m,n}
(define ejk (set-union sj sk))
(display "ejk: ") (display ejk) (newline)

; ({a,c,d,e,f,i,j,k,m,o} ∩ {b,c,d,e,f,g,h,i,j,k,l,m,n,p}) ∪ (({a,b,f,h,m,n} ∩ {a,d,k,l}) ∩ {d,j,n,o})
(define inner2a (set-intersect sl sm))
(define inner2b (set-intersect (set-intersect sn so) sp))
(define inner2 (set-union inner2a inner2b))
(display "inner2: ") (display inner2) (newline)

; inner2 ∩ {a,c,d,g,k,l,m,o}
(define inner3 (set-intersect inner2 sq))
(display "inner3: ") (display inner3) (newline)

; ejk ∪ inner3
(define inner4 (set-union ejk inner3))
(display "inner4: ") (display inner4) (newline)

; {a,l} ∩ {a,c,d,e,f,h,j,k,p}
(define inner5 (set-intersect sr ss))
(display "inner5: ") (display inner5) (newline)

; inner4 ∩ inner5
(define part2 (set-intersect inner4 inner5))
(display "part2: ") (display part2) (newline)

; part1 ∪ part2
(define left-branch (set-union part1 part2))
(display "left-branch: ") (display left-branch) (newline)

; {e,h,o} ∪ {a,c,d,f,g,h,i,k,l,m,n,p}
(define right1 (set-union st su))
(display "right1: ") (display right1) (newline)

; {b,c,d,i,k,l,m,n,o} ∩ {a,d,f,g,j,l,m,n,o}
(define right2a (set-intersect sw sx))

; {d,e,f,h,n,o,p} ∪ right2a
(define right2 (set-union sv right2a))
(display "right2: ") (display right2) (newline)

(display "right-branch: ") (display right-branch) (newline)

; Final answer: top ∩ bottom

%parameter-convert                 [parameters]   Internal: applies the parameter's converter to VAL without setting it. Used by parameterize to pre-convert.
  %parameter-raw-set!                [parameters]   Internal: sets a parameter's value directly, bypassing the converter. Used by parameterize restore.
  (wile algebra lattice)             library        Lattice types: flat, powerset, product, map lattices with join/meet.
  (wile algebra setoid)              library        Setoids: sets with explicit equivalence relations.
  (wile algebra)                     library        Algebraic structures, equational rewriting, and symbolic normalization. Structures: setoids, orders, lattices, closure operators, Heyting/Boolean algebras, monoids, categories, semirings, groups, rings, differential rings, fields. Rewriting: axiom-driven term normalization. Symbolic: theory projections, recursive normalization, transformation tracing.
  (wile control)                     [library (not imported)] Extended control flow: reset, shift, delimited continuations.
  boolean->heyting                   [algebra]      Project Boolean algebra B to a Heyting algebra.
  boolean->lattice                   [algebra]      Project Boolean algebra B to its underlying lattice, forgetting complement.
  boolean->ring                      [algebra]      Project Boolean algebra B to a ring of characteristic 2.
  boolean-complement                 [algebra]      Compute the complement of A in Boolean algebra B.
  boolean-join                       [algebra]      Compute the join (least upper bound) of A and B in Boolean algebra B.
  boolean-leq?                       [algebra]      Test whether A is less than or equal to B in Boolean algebra B.
  boolean-meet                       [algebra]      Compute the meet (greatest lower bound) of A and B in Boolean algebra B.

arguments.code:
(import (wile algebra))

;; Sets as sorted string lists
(define A '("b" "c" "d" "e" "g" "h" "i" "j" "k" "l" "m" "n" "o" "p"))
(define B '("c" "f" "h" "i" "j" "k" "l" "n" "o"))

(define C '("d" "g" "h" "n"))
(define D '("c" "e" "f" "g" "j" "n" "p"))
(define E '("b" "c" "e" "m" "p"))

(define F '("e" "f" "g" "h" "m" "n" "o"))
(define G '("f"))
(define H '("b" "c" "e" "f" "i"))
(define I '("a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "k" "l" "m"))

(define J '("j" "k" "l" "m" "n"))
(define K '("a" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "h" "i" "j" "l" "m" "n" "o" "p"))
(define L '("d" "e" "f" "g" "h" "i" "j" "k" "l" "m" "n"))
(define M '("c" "d" "f" "g" "l" "n"))

(define N '("a" "f" "h" "k" "m"))
(define O '("e" "g" "i" "k" "l" "m" "n"))
(define P '("a" "c" "j" "l" "m" "p"))

(define Q '("d" "m"))
(define R '("b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "h" "j" "k"))
(define S '("a" "f"))
(define T '("a" "b" "c" "d" "e" "f" "g" "i" "j" "l" "m" "n" "o" "p"))

(define U '("l"))
(define V '("a" "b" "c" "f" "g" "k" "l" "m" "o"))

(define W '("c" "d" "e" "g" "h" "n" "p"))
(define X '("a" "c" "d" "e" "g" "h" "i" "j" "k" "l"))
(define Y '("j" "m"))

;; Step 1: left part of outer expression
;; ({b,c,d,e,g,h,i,j,k,l,m,n,o,p} ∪ {c,f,h,i,j,k,l,n,o}) ∩ (({d,g,h,n} ∪ {c,e,f,g,j,n,p}) ∩ {b,c,e,m,p})
(define step1a (set-union A B))
(define step1b (set-union C D))
(define step1c (set-intersect step1b E))
(define left-part (set-intersect step1a step1c))
(display "left-part: ") (display left-part) (newline)

tool_trace.output: {"output":"left-part: (c e p)\n"}

arguments.code:
;; Step 2: right part - innermost first
;; (({e,f,g,h,m,n,o} ∩ {f}) ∩ ({b,c,e,f,i} ∩ {a,b,c,d,e,f,k,l,m}))
(define r1 (set-intersect F G))
(define r2 (set-intersect H I))
(define r3 (set-intersect r1 r2))
(display "r3: ") (display r3) (newline)

;; ({j,k,l,m,n} ∪ {a,c,d,e,f,g,h,i,j,l,m,n,o,p}) ∪ ({d,e,f,g,h,i,j,k,l,m,n} ∪ {c,d,f,g,l,n})
(define r4 (set-union J K))
(define r5 (set-union L M))
(define r6 (set-union r4 r5))
(display "r6: ") (display r6) (newline)

;; r3 ∪ r6
(define r7 (set-union r3 r6))
(display "r7: ") (display r7) (newline)

tool_trace.output:
{"output":"r3: (f)
r6: (a c d e f g h i j k l m n o p)
r7: (a c d e f g h i j k l m n o p)
"}

arguments.code:
;; Now the inner part with {l} and {a,b,c,f,g,k,l,m,o}
;; (({a,f,h,k,m} ∪ ({e,g,i,k,l,m,n} ∩ {a,c,j,l,m,p})) ∪ ((({d,m} ∪ {b,c,d,e,f,h,j,k}) ∩ {a,f}) ∩ {a,b,c,d,e,f,g,i,j,l,m,n,o,p}))
(define s1 (set-intersect O P))
(display "s1 (O∩P): ") (display s1) (newline)
(define s2 (set-union N s1))
(display "s2 (N∪s1): ") (display s2) (newline)
(define s3 (set-union Q R))
(display "s3 (Q∪R): ") (display s3) (newline)
(define s4 (set-intersect s3 S))
(display "s4 (s3∩S): ") (display s4) (newline)
(define s5 (set-intersect s4 T))
(display "s5 (s4∩T): ") (display s5) (newline)
(define s6 (set-union s2 s5))
(display "s6 (s2∪s5): ") (display s6) (newline)

;; ∩ {l}
(define s7 (set-intersect s6 U))
(display "s7 (s6∩{l}): ") (display s7) (newline)

;; ∪ {a,b,c,f,g,k,l,m,o}
(define s8 (set-union s7 V))
(display "s8 (s7∪V): ") (display s8) (newline)

tool_trace.output:
{"output":"s1 (O∩P): (l m)
s2 (N∪s1): (a f h k l m)
s3 (Q∪R): (b c d e f h j k m)
s4 (s3∩S): (f)
s5 (s4∩T): (f)
s6 (s2∪s5): (a f h k l m)
s7 (s6∩{l}): (l)
s8 (s7∪V): (a b c f g k l m o)
"}

arguments.code:
;; r7 ∩ s8
(define r8 (set-intersect r7 s8))
(display "r7∩s8: ") (display r8) (newline)

;; Now ∩ ({c,d,e,g,h,n,p} ∩ ({a,c,d,e,g,h,i,j,k,l} ∪ {j,m}))
(define t1 (set-union X Y))
(display "X∪Y: ") (display t1) (newline)
(define t2 (set-intersect W t1))
(display "W∩(X∪Y): ") (display t2) (newline)

;; r8 ∩ t2
(define r9 (set-intersect r8 t2))
(display "r8∩t2 (right part): ") (display r9) (newline)

;; Final: left-part ∩ right-part
(define result (set-intersect left-part r9))
(display "FINAL RESULT: ") (display result) (newline)

tool_trace.output:
{"output":"r7∩s8: (a c f g k l m o)
X∪Y: (a c d e g h i j k l m)
W∩(X∪Y): (c d e g h)
r8∩t2 (right part): (c g)
FINAL RESULT: (c)
"}
